samples.xml_description: Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic. 16-bit input operand A. 16-bit input operand B. Carry-in input. 16-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output. Design a 16-bit full adder using a 8-bit adder. Use the following code to instantiate a 8-bit adder. adder_8bit adder_8bit_inst(.a(a[7:0]), .b(b[7:0]), .Cin(Cin), .y(y[7:0]), .Co(Co_1)); Implement the remaining logic to form a 16-bit adder.
